goal: Remove dead code, deduplicate toast libraries, extract AuthRoute, clean window pollution
summary: Phase 2 complete. All structural cleanup items finished: (1) deleted orphaned Index.tsx with no import references; (2) removed duplicate shadcn/ui Toaster from App.tsx, keeping only Sonner; (3) extracted inline AuthRoute into src/components/AuthRoute.tsx with full TypeScript/ESLint compliance; (4) replaced window.__addLiveReaction pollution in LiveViewerPage with a module-level reactionRef variable.
stepSummaries:
1. Delete src/pages/Index.tsx and verify no import references remain [verified]
  2. Remove Toaster import and JSX from App.tsx; keep Sonner import and usage [verified]
  3. Extract AuthRoute function from App.tsx into src/components/AuthRoute.tsx and update App.tsx to import and use it [verified]
  4. Remove window.__addLiveMutation or __addLiveReaction assignment in LiveViewerPage [verified]
